ref: It is also true that we must love God with all our heart, mind, and strength, and that we must love others as much as we love ourselves. These commandments are more important than all the sacrifices and offerings that we could possibly make.‚Äù

translated: If someone says he has not eaten dog meat, not drunk palm wine, and not slept with a woman except his wife or has not slept with another man's wife except his own, it means he is telling the truth. ref: They went to him and said, ‚ÄúTeacher, we know that you are honest. You treat everyone with the same respect, no matter who they are. And you teach the truth about what God wants people to do. Tell us, should we pay taxes to the Emperor or not?‚Äù

ref: Jesus answered, ‚ÄúThe most important one says: ‚ÄòPeople of Israel, you have only one Lord and God.

translated: Some people say that if someone offends you, you should say, ‚ÄòMay what you did to me be done to you.‚Äô But I say you should not do to others what they did to you.
